data: show me all open bugs
Listed open bug issues from Redmine
read
show me all open bugs
direct

Here are all 27 open bugs, with overdue items flagged. The E-Learning Platform has the most bugs (14), followed by Mobile App (11) and web Platform (2). Six bugs are currently overdue. Would you like me to assign any of these, check for risks, or create a dashboard view?

read
who is working on issue #3?
direct
Issue #3 isn't found in Redmine. Would you like to check a different issue number or create a new one?
list all issues assigned to Alice
Listed all issues assigned to Alice Fullstack
read
list all issues assigned to Alice
direct

Alice is assigned to 12 issues, including overdue high‑priority checkout errors (#58, #37, #28) and the high‑priority payment crash (#40) with no due date. She also has the backup automation script (#23, normal, due Apr 20), UI spacing work (#29, low, in progress, due Apr 18), and several normal‑priority tasks such as login fix, dashboard feature, internationalization, and live streaming, plus two closed items (#9, #6).  

Would you like to see her workload summary or adjust any priorities?
create a high priority bug called payment crash in mobile-app
Created a high priority bug in the mobile-app project
write
create a high priority bug called payment crash in mobile-app

Issue #59 "payment crash" has been created as a high-priority bug in the mobile-app project. It is currently unassigned and has no due set.

Would you like to assign it to someone or set a due date?

what are the risks this week?
Identified risks and overdue issues for the week
risk
what are the risks this week?
risk_agent

This week there are 8 overdue issues blocking delivery, Alice is overloaded with 12 open tasks (3 overdue), and 22 issues remain unassigned, many high‑priority. Additionally, 5 in‑progress items have stalled with no updates for ≥5 days. Immediate actions: reassign some of Alice’s overdue work, assign owners to the high‑priority unassigned items, and follow up on stalled tasks. Would you like me to help assign any of these issues or check progress on specific tasks?
any overdue issues?
Found and listed overdue issues across projects
risk
any overdue issues?
risk_agent

There are 8 overdue issues, the oldest delayed by 49 days.  
Alice Fullstack and Amira Frontend each have multiple overdue items, indicating workload imbalance.  
Issues #21 and #22 are severely overdue and need re-estimation or additional support.  
Alice has three overdue issues; consider moving one to another developer, and verify the closure status of issue #24.  
Would you like me to reassign any of these overdue issues to balance the workload?
